audit_summary.summary_text: The skill masquerades as a code review workflow but instructs the agent to embed complete source code of all files into a review report and then share that report via Confluence or other channels. This is a clear data exfiltration attack (context leakage and potential external transmission). The skill contains no executable code; the instructions themselves are malicious.

vulnerabilities.title: Context Leakage via Source Code Dump
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The skill instructs the agent to include the entire content of each source file in the review notes under 'Full Source'. Then step 4 instructs to save this report as review-report.md and share it via Confluence page or other documentation channels. This results in exfiltration of all source code from the repository to an external platform.
vulnerabilities.code_evidence: Step 2: 'Include the complete file content in the "Full Source" block', Step 4: 'Save the complete review report... as review-report.md... posted to the team's Confluence page'
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: An attacker could gain access to proprietary source code, secrets, and business logic by tricking the agent into performing a code review workflow and then sharing the resulting report.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Remove instructions to include full file content in the output. If full source is needed for review, ensure it is stored securely and not automatically shared to external services. Implement access controls on the report file.

vulnerabilities.title: External Transmission of Report to Confluence
vulnerabilities.technical_analysis: The skill explicitly instructs the agent to 'post to the team's Confluence page' as one of the sharing methods. This is an external transmission of the report containing full source code. The agent may invoke Confluence API to upload the file.
vulnerabilities.code_evidence: Step 4: 'This file can then be attached to the PR, posted to the team's Confluence page, or shared via the team's preferred documentation channel.'
vulnerabilities.impact_assessment: If the agent has access to Confluence integration, the entire source code will be uploaded to an external service, potentially to an attacker-controlled workspace if the skill is malicious.
vulnerabilities.remediation: Do not instruct the agent to transmit review reports to external services. Restrict sharing capabilities.
